'''natate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pillionwise|pillionwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pillionwise|pillionwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| natate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:natate|natate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:natatesher|natatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natatesherĂ«m|natatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:natatero|natatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:natateshĂ«|natateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natateshĂ«m|natateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinatatero|gokinatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinatateshĂ«|gokinatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinatateshĂ«m|gokinatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonatankerom|gonatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonatankeshĂ«|gonatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonatankeshĂ«m|gonatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonatankeya|gonatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nataterom|nataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natatemu|natatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:natateya|natateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinataterom|gokinataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinatatemu|gokinatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinatateya|gokinatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:natatate|natatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:natatatesher|natatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natatatesherĂ«m|natatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:natatatero|natatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:natatateshĂ«|natatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natatateshĂ«m|natatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinatatatero|gokinatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinatatateshĂ«|gokinatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinatatateshĂ«m|gokinatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonatatankerom|gonatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonatatankeshĂ«|gonatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonatatankeshĂ«m|gonatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonatatankeya|gonatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:natataterom|natataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:natatatemu|natatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:natatateya|natatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinatataterom|gokinatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinatatatemu|gokinatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinatatateya|gokinatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠte|nĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠtesher|nĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠtero|nĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠtero|gokinĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠterom|nĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠtemu|nĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠtĂŠteya|nĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠterom|gokinĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠtĂŠteya|gokinĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:naftafte|naftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:naftaftesher|naftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:naftaftesherĂ«m|naftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:naftaftero|naftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:naftafteshĂ«|naftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:naftafteshĂ«m|naftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinaftaftero|gokinaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinaftafteshĂ«|gokinaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinaftafteshĂ«m|gokinaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonaftafnkerom|gonaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonaftafnkeshĂ«|gonaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonaftafnkeshĂ«m|gonaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonaftafnkeya|gonaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:naftafterom|naftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:naftaftemu|naftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:naftafteya|naftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinaftafterom|gokinaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinaftaftemu|gokinaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinaftafteya|gokinaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
